generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who's served our country, I believe we need to give our security agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. The recent attacks show we can't afford to tie their hands with outdated rules. We owe it to our communities to let professionals do their jobs. #NationalSecurityFirst
